subject: ACK/ETA requested: WS1.4 type-fix gates
body:
Coordinator follow-up from Luminous Threading Asteroid.

I can see the typed runtime/options wrapper and remote-context scanner type fixes in the WIP, and the staged set remains empty. Please ACK with current status: are graph-core test/type-check/lint/build and git diff --check still running, green, or blocked?

If green, send the readiness note and I will route Hubble/type for the final re-review. Keep holding commit-window activity until type CLEAN/GO returns.
